calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Trainable policy head on the REE latent (Track-1d): does a real PPO actor on frozen z_world recover competence (direct H1 test of prediction-rich/action-poor)
items.note: Track-1d of the post-724 competence-recovery campaign (conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN). DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; brake-EXEMPT). THE DIRECT H1 test the 724 autopsy prescribed but neither 734 nor 735 runs: bolt a real trainable PPO actor-critic onto REE's OWN frozen z_world latent (agent.sense(obs).z_world.detach()) and ask whether it forages where the bias-head stack cannot. 734's PPO reads RAW obs (never uses REE's representation); this reads the REE latent. Arms per (rung,seed): ree_bias_head (warmed 724-A0 all-ON under its own bias-head selection = incompetence control), ppo_ree_latent (H1 treatment: PPO on frozen z_world), ppo_raw_obs (734's raw-obs PPO = encoder-loss reference), greedy_oracle (ceiling/readiness), random_walk (floor). Two rungs imported byte-identical from 734: D0 (724 baseline, deficit localized) + D3 (hazard-free, fair usability test). Reuses 734's validated PPO machinery (PPOPolicyNet/_ppo_update/_compute_gae) + 724-A0 warmup (_train_all_on_agent) verbatim; only adds the z_world state-extractor + a state_fn-parameterized PPO trainer. Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): readiness fail (either oracle sub-floor OR bias_head already clears D0 so premise not reproduced) -> substrate_not_ready_requeue; ppo_ree_latent clears 1.0 majority at hazard-free D3 -> policy_head_on_latent_recovers_competence (H1 CONFIRMED: REE latent is a usable action-learning substrate, the bias-head was the deficit -> build a policy-learning substrate on the existing representation); latent sub-floor but ppo_raw_obs clears -> latent_lossy_raw_obs_recovers (encoder discards signal -> route obs-encoding P-C/739); neither clears at oracle-achievable D3 -> policy_learning_insufficient_or_deeper (weigh against 738 local_view_greedy which DID forage the same env). CONVERTS the campaign's central build decision from inference to MEASUREMENT. priority 155 (higher=runs-first, above 734's 150). Mint N/A (ARM_FINGERPRINT_EXEMPT: per-cell REE warmup + PPO from scratch, no reusable baseline). validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (all 5 arms x 2 rungs execute, z_world extraction + latent PPO train/eval + self-route wiring correct; dry policy_learning_insufficient label expected at 6 PPO eps). Portfolio 737/738/739 (P-A this / P-B anchor landed / P-C encoder reserve). Route result to /failure-autopsy before governance use.

items.title: Curriculum competence-recovery diagnostic (Track-1c): does a two-stage easy->hard curriculum clear the 1.0 foraging floor where flat P1-long (724 A1/A4) did not, or is transfer/capacity the true ceiling
items.note: Track-1c of the post-724 competence-recovery campaign (conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN). diagnostic; claim_ids=[]; non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. Two-stage CURRICULUM training: Stage-A train the all-ON stack (714 ARM_ON via 724 A0 recipe) to forage an EASY env, then Stage-B fine-tune into the hard 724 env. Arms at MATCHED 300ep total P1: A0 flat-hard control (==724 A1), C1 curriculum e2-frozen-in-StageB, C2 curriculum e2-unfrozen-in-StageB, C3 3-rung easy->med->hard. Load-bearing DV: HARD-env P2 mean_resources_per_episode vs 1.0 floor; Stage-A EASY foraging is the load-bearing PREMISE (same statistic/floor). Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): both oracles clear + a curriculum arm forages easy AND clears hard while A0 does not -> competence_curriculum_buildable (route /implement-substrate staged regime); premise met but no arm clears hard -> transfer_capacity_ceiling; premise/oracle/A0 fail -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. BRAKE-EXEMPT (competence/curriculum diagnostic, not a conversion/de-commit falsifier; claim_ids=[] zeroes the re-derive brake). OBS-DIM PARITY: easy/med rungs keep reef structural channels ON (world_obs_dim=275 == hard) but neutralize difficulty, so the transferred agent's fixed-width encoder spans all rungs (guarded at runtime). ID moved 734->736: 734/735 were taken by sibling Tracks 1a (env-difficulty sweep) / 1b (drive-balance) between design and queue; Track-1a had not produced results, so the easy config was chosen independently and is validated by the Stage-A readiness gate. Route result to /failure-autopsy before any governance action.
